tasks.title: Create validate_api_key() function
tasks.description: Create validate_api_key() function in app.rs to make test API call to provider's /v1/models endpoint, handle different response structures (Anthropic vs OpenAI-compatible), and return validation result with error details if invalid
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify validate_api_key returns Ok for valid Anthropic API key
AddUnitTest: verify validate_api_key returns Ok for valid OpenAI-compatible API key
AddUnitTest: verify validate_api_key returns Err for invalid API key with error details
AddUnitTest: verify validate_api_key handles network timeout errors gracefully
AddErrorHandlingTest: test validation with empty API key string
tasks.impl_notes: Use reqwest to make POST request to /v1/models with Authorization header. Check response status and structure. For Anthropic, check for specific error response fields.

tasks.title: Add loading state during API key validation
tasks.description: Show 'Validating...' message in UI and disable input during validation to prevent double-submission
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify loading state is set during validation
AddUnitTest: verify input is disabled while validating
AddUnitTest: verify loading state clears after validation completes
tasks.impl_notes: Add validation_in_progress state to the app state struct. Use this to conditionally render loading indicator and disable buttons.

tasks.title: Add error handling with retry option
tasks.description: Display user-friendly error message on validation failure, allow user to re-enter API key, and do NOT save invalid keys
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify invalid API key shows error message to user
AddUnitTest: verify user can retry after validation failure
AddUnitTest: verify invalid keys are not persisted to credential store
AddErrorHandlingTest: test error message display for network failures
tasks.impl_notes: On validation failure, show error dialog with 'Try Again' button. Clear the invalid API key from memory. Log error details for debugging.

tasks.title: Handle provider-specific validation endpoints
tasks.description: Support Anthropic: https://api.anthropic.com/v1/models, OpenAI-compatible: /models endpoint, LM Studio: /api/tags endpoint
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify Anthropic API key validation uses correct endpoint
AddUnitTest: verify OpenAI-compatible API key validation uses /models endpoint
AddUnitTest: verify LM Studio API key validation uses /api/tags endpoint
AddUnitTest: verify unknown provider falls back to default /v1/models endpoint
tasks.impl_notes: Match on provider type to construct correct validation endpoint URL. Each provider may have different base_url settings.

tasks.title: Add unit tests for API key validation
tasks.description: Test valid API key acceptance, invalid API key rejection, and network error handling
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: test valid_api_key_acceptance returns success
AddUnitTest: test invalid_api_key_rejection returns error
AddUnitTest: test network_error_handling returns network error variant
RunTestSuite: execute all API key validation tests
tasks.impl_notes: Create mock HTTP server for testing different provider responses. Test both success and failure scenarios.

tasks.title: Wire ConnectModelDialog after successful API key validation
tasks.description: Transition from API key input to model selection dialog and pass validated credentials to model dialog
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify ConnectModelDialog is shown after successful validation
AddUnitTest: verify validated credentials are passed to model dialog
AddIntegrationTest: verify complete flow from API key to model selection
tasks.impl_notes: After validate_api_key returns Ok, transition app state to ShowConnectModelDialog. Pass provider config with validated credentials.

tasks.title: Fetch available models from provider after validation
tasks.description: Query provider's /v1/models endpoint after API key validation, filter models based on provider, and populate model list for dialog
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify models are fetched from Anthropic /v1/models
AddUnitTest: verify models are fetched from OpenAI-compatible /models
AddUnitTest: verify models are filtered correctly per provider
AddUnitTest: verify empty model list is handled gracefully
tasks.impl_notes: After successful API key validation, call provider's models endpoint. Parse response and filter to supported model IDs.

tasks.title: Configure provider with selected model
tasks.description: Store model selection with provider config, set as active provider/model, and return to Chat mode
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify selected model is stored in provider config
AddUnitTest: verify active provider is set after model selection
AddUnitTest: verify app transitions to Chat mode after selection
AddIntegrationTest: verify complete flow: validation -> model select -> chat
tasks.impl_notes: After model selection, update provider config with selected model ID. Set as active provider. Transition to Chat mode.

tasks.title: Fix hardcoded default model (TD-6)
tasks.description: Remove gpt-4o as default for non-OpenAI providers and use selected model instead
test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: verify non-OpenAI providers do not default to gpt-4o
AddUnitTest: verify selected model is used instead of hardcoded default
tasks.impl_notes: Remove hardcoded gpt-4o from app.rs:972. Ensure provider's actual selected model is used.

tasks.title: Add integration tests for complete API key flow
